info.title: Azure Daily Cost Compare
info.description: A simple tool to provide daily cost comparisons for an entire Azure billing account—across multiple tenants and subscriptions—between the current month and the same day of the previous month. It helps track spending trends, whether costs are rising, falling, or staying the same.

options.name: --date
options.description: Optional reference date for the report (format: yyyy-MM-dd). If not provided, current date will be used.

options.name: --weekly-pattern-analysis
options.description: Show weekly pattern analysis comparing corresponding weekdays

options.name: --day-of-week-averages
options.description: Show day of week averages comparing cost trends by weekday

options.name: --previous-day-utc-data-load-delay
options.description: Number of hours after midnight UTC used to determine when the previous day's Azure cost data is considered complete enough to load. For example, a value of 4 means data for the previous day is assumed complete at 04:00 UTC. Valid values: 0–23. Setting is used now and persists for future executions.
